_doc: Synthetic fixture set for the VBA-error branch of the excel-activities/execute-macro-failures playbook. Agent must chain: folders → jobs list faulted → jobs get (COMException 0x80020009 wrapping Run-time error 91) → jobs logs (Trace shows macro dispatched and started executing, then faulted inside VBA) → workflow source. The HRESULT 0x80020009 + inner 'Run-time error 91' text is decisive for branch 2 (VBA bug inside macro) vs. branch 7 (missing add-in, which would have 424/429 inner).

rules.match: or jobs list --folder-key f0011111-2222-3333-4444-555566667777 --state Faulted --output json
